title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with New India Assurance! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
